SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.GroupByDisposit: Use token ownership and disposition to suggest an initial side assignment.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.ShowTrackerCont: Add Side Initiative controls to the combat tracker header.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.CommanderContro: Choose who can change a side's commander from the combat tracker.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.InitiativeMetho: Choose whether the module rolls one d20 per side or rolls every combatant and averages the result.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.LegendaryAction: In side initiative every creature on a side acts at once, so CPRs usual end-of-turn legendary-action prompt never fires. With this on, whenever a creature on the active side finishes an Action (accounting for Extra Attack), the popup will trigger.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Notifications.LegendaryA: Legendary Action Windows are enabled, but require both Chris' Premades and MidiQOL to be active.
Legendary Action Windows are disabled because the installed Chris' Premades API is not supported.
Advance the active side to the next turn.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Notifications.NoActiveGM: No active GM is available to process that commander change.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Notifications.GambitsOpp: Gambits Premades Opportunity Attack is enabled, but it is not side-aware. Disable it when using Side Initiative.
Gambits Premades Opportunity Attack integration is disabled because the installed version ({version}) is not supported. Supported versions: {supported}.
Gambits Premades Opportunity Attack integration is disabled because the installed source no longer matches the supported shape.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.UseCombatDock.H: Show a docked combat tracker at the top of the screen that displays the two opposing sides' commanders facing each other, instead of the per-combatant list.
Size of the docked combat tracker.
SIDE-INITIATIVE.Settings.HideConflicting: Automatically hide other UIs docked to the top of the screen (for example the DnD5e calendar) while the combat dock is visible, to avoid clutter. The scene navigation and player list are kept.
